bird.name: Red-crowned parakeet
bird.summary: The red-crowned parakeet (Cyanoramphus novaezelandiae), also known as red-fronted parakeet and by its Māori name of kākāriki, is a small pa…

locations.name: 北地大区
locations.summary: 北地大区（毛利語：Te Tai-tokerau，英語：Northland），为新西兰16个地方政府区中最北端的一个[4][5]，该地区以其温暖的天气而闻名。其行政中心和主要的人口中心是法纳雷市，最大的城镇是凯里凯里。该大区总面积13,78…

locations.name: 科罗曼德尔半岛
locations.summary: 科罗曼德尔半岛（英語：Coromandel Peninsula）位于新西兰北岛中东部，长约110公里，平均宽31公里，西临泰晤士湾与豪拉基湾，东濒普伦蒂湾。半岛上耸立有摩艾豪岭和科罗曼德尔岭。1769年，詹姆斯·库克在科罗曼德尔半岛东部的…

relations.subject: Red-crowned parakeet
relations.evidence: On the mainland, this species occurs in large forest blocks in Northland, Coromandel and central North Island

relations.subject: Red-crowned parakeet
relations.evidence: Red-crowned parakeets can live in a wide variety of habitats including dense temperate rainforests, coastal forests, scrubland, forest edges and open areas.Marchant, S., Higgins, P
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Red-crowned parakeet
relations.evidence: It used to be classified as near threatened as invasive predators had pushed it out of its historical range but it is now at least concern
relations.object_summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。
